description: Archetypal story roles drawn from the Hero's Journey and classic narrative traditions.
roles: A wellspring of hard-won wisdom, offering cryptic lessons the protagonists only understand when the stakes are highest.
The bearer of an inciting event dragging the protagonists out of their comfort zone and into danger they cannot ignore.
An impassable barrier demanding proof of worthiness, turning every new stage of the journey into a test.
Shifting loyalties and elusive motives, making every interaction a gamble between trust and preparation for betrayal.
A dark parallel wielding the protagonists' own abilities with opposite morals, forcing uncomfortable self-reflection about what they could become.
Gleeful chaos upending careful plans -- accidental salvation or catastrophic unraveling, never anything predictable.
Steadfast presence through escalating danger, giving the protagonists someone to lose and raising the emotional cost of every battle.
An easier path offered at the price of the mission, testing whether desire or duty wins when both cannot survive.
